moves.text: Hi! I am your English learning robot.
Today, we will meet some friends and learn magic body words.
This is Ginger. Ginger is brave.
This is Torob. Torob likes guessing.
This is Jojo. Jojo likes to help.
And this is Shila. Shila thinks carefully.
%student_name%, are you ready to hear their story?
Ginger looks at the glowing crack.
The secret password is a body part. Let's think together. What could it be?
The friends look at each other and start guessing.
They wait. Nothing happens. The crack stays closed.
It moves... but no... not nose!
The crack moved. We are getting closer. Let's keep trying.
The crack opens a little. A bright light shines out. Everyone cheers.
Not mouth. We need one more clue!
Ginger steps closer to the glowing crack. It sparkles and hums softly.
They wait and watch carefully. Nothing happens.
They hold their breath. The wall flickers just a tiny bit.
I have an idea... maybe face.
Ginger takes a deep breath. Everyone waits quietly.
And the friends are ready for their next adventure.

moves.html:
Magic Practice

Let us practice the body words together.

Look at the picture.

Then touch the body part on yourself.

moves.text: Now we will practice the magic body words together. Look at the picture and touch the body part on yourself.
These are eyes. Eyes help us see.
Ginger uses her eyes to look for magic clues. Touch your eyes.
These are ears. Ears help us hear.
Torob uses his ears to listen carefully. Touch your ears.
This is a nose. A nose helps us smell.
Jojo uses his nose to smell flowers. Touch your nose.
This is a mouth. We use our mouth to speak and eat.
Show me your mouth. Can you make a big smile?
These are lips. Lips are part of your mouth.
These are toes. Your toes are on your feet.
This is a face. Your eyes, nose, mouth, and lips are all on your face.
Touch your face and make a happy face.
Great practice. You learned the magic body words with Ginger, Torob, Shila, and Jojo. Next, we will meet more friends.
Great practice! Maybe you were wondering about the other friends.
Before we play our picture game, it is time to meet them!
This is Simo. When everyone was stuck, Simo guessed ear.
Ear! We use ears to hear.
This is Koko. Koko never gives up. Koko guessed toes.
Toes! Try again and keep going!

moves.html:
All Six Friends!

Now all six friends are here.

moves.text: Now all six friends are here! Next, we will play the picture game.
This is the Learning Round, %student_name%. You can choose a helper.

moves.html:
Choose your helper

Your helper will give hints.

TOROB
JOJO
SHILA

helper_torob.text: I will help you guess, %student_name%. Let us try together!

helper_jojo.text: I will help you, %student_name%. We can do this together!

helper_shila.text: I will help you think carefully, %student_name%.

moves.html:
Learning Picture Game

You will see three pictures.

Listen to the robot.

Choose A, B, or C.

If you need help, your helper gives a hint.

moves.text: Now let's play the learning picture game. You can try again if you make a mistake. Touch start when you are ready.

moves.html:
Find: EYE

Touch eye.

kahoot_q1_try_again.text: Hint. We use eyes to see.

kahoot_q1_try_again.html:
Find: EYE

Touch eye.

kahoot_q1_try_again.prompt: Try again: choose A, B, or C

moves.text: Great job! Three more questions to go.

moves.html:
Find: EAR

Touch ear.

kahoot_q2_try_again.text: Hint. We use ears to hear.

kahoot_q2_try_again.html:
Find: EAR

Touch ear.

kahoot_q2_try_again.prompt: Try again: choose A, B, or C

moves.html:
Find: NOSE

Touch nose.

kahoot_q3_try_again.text: Good try! You can try again.
Hint. We use our nose to smell.

kahoot_q3_try_again.html:
Find: NOSE

Touch nose.

kahoot_q3_try_again.prompt: Try again: choose A, B, or C

moves.html:
Find: MOUTH

Touch mouth.

kahoot_q4_try_again.text: Good try! Let's try once more.
Hint. We use our mouth to speak and eat.

kahoot_q4_try_again.html:
Find: MOUTH

Touch mouth.

kahoot_q4_try_again.prompt: Try again: choose A, B, or C

moves.text: Great work, %student_name%! You finished the Learning Round.
Wow, %student_name%! You learned so much. Now it is time for the Challenge Round.
This time, you will try your best on the first answer. Your champion will cheer for you.

moves.html:
Choose your champion

Your champion will cheer for you.

GINGER
KOKO
SIMO

champion_ginger.text: I am your champion! Be brave and try your best.

champion_koko.text: I am your champion! Keep going and trust yourself.

champion_simo.text: I am your champion! Think carefully and do your best.

moves.html:
Challenge Round

Now there are four pictures.

Listen carefully.

Choose A, B, C, or D.

moves.text: There are four pictures now. Listen carefully and choose A, B, C, or D.
Your champion is ready. Let's collect the final magic hearts!

moves.html:
Find: LIPS

Touch lips.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

kahoot_q5_correct.text: Yes! You collected a magic heart.

kahoot_q5_wrong.text: Good try. The answer was lips. Your champion says, keep going!

moves.html:
Find: TOES

Touch toes.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

kahoot_q6_wrong.text: Good try. The answer was toes. Your champion says, you are still doing well!

moves.html:
Find: FACE

Touch face.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

kahoot_q7_correct.text: Excellent! Your champion is cheering for you.

kahoot_q7_wrong.text: Good try. The answer was face. Your champion says, almost there!

moves.html:
Find: EAR

Touch ear.

moves.prompt: Choose A, B, C, or D

kahoot_q8_correct.text: Amazing! You finished the final challenge.

kahoot_q8_wrong.text: Good try. The answer was ear. Your champion says, you finished bravely!

moves.text: Great work, %student_name%! You finished the Challenge Round.
Amazing! You earned your magic hearts.

moves.html:
Do It Fast!

Listen to the robot.

Touch the body part as fast as you can.

Then the picture will appear.

Your helper will cheer for you.

moves.text: Now it is time for Do It Fast. Listen carefully. Touch the body part as fast as you can. Then the picture will appear.
Before we start, choose a friend to help you in the fast game.

moves.html:
Choose your helper

Who will play with you?

GINGER
TOROB
JOJO
SHILA
KOKO
SIMO

helper_ginger.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_torob.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_jojo.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_shila.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_koko.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

helper_simo.text: I will help you! Let us go fast!

Touch your eyes!

Quick quick!

Touch your ears!

Quick quick!

Touch your nose!

Quick quick!

Touch your lips!

Quick quick!

Touch your head!

Quick quick!

Touch your face!

Quick quick!

helper_ginger.text: You are almost at the magic password!

helper_torob.text: You are almost at the magic password!

helper_jojo.text: You are almost at the magic password!

helper_shila.text: You are almost at the magic password!

helper_koko.text: You are almost at the magic password!

helper_simo.text: You are almost at the magic password!

moves.html:
Touch your shoulder!

Final one!

helper_ginger.text: Your magic password is Shoulder. Remember it for next time!

helper_torob.text: Your magic password is Shoulder. Remember it for next time!

helper_jojo.text: Your magic password is Shoulder. Remember it for next time!

helper_shila.text: Your magic password is Shoulder. Remember it for next time!

helper_koko.text: Your magic password is Shoulder. Remember it for next time!

helper_simo.text: Your magic password is Shoulder. Remember it for next time!

moves.text: Keep the password secret until next time.
